况天佑，人王圣母大战后，重生1938年红溪村，重生成为红眼僵尸。
在时空长河之中，偶得时间空间之力，进化为金眼僵神！
走出属于自己的无敌之路！
马小玲:嘘！我们偷偷谈恋爱，不要告诉姑婆。
将臣:可恶的况天佑，怎么实力这么强，好不容易快赢了，时空倒流是什么鬼？
马叮当:造大孽了，我这么和将臣有了个儿子。
司徒奋仁:山本一夫，大哥最喜欢的，还是我小司徒！
女娲、人王圣母、命运:灭世？都打不过况天佑，灭个屁灭，不灭了，摆烂了！
况天佑:原来，我这么厉害了吗？哎呀，好苦恼，居然无敌了，无事可做，小玲，咱们生二胎！
况天涯:所以，爱会消失的嘛，爸爸！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8bcdc1d58307d8fadb7da2a65749ccda","author":"恨相逢","author_id":"","book_id":"7271652309157809214","book_name":"僵约：僵神况天佑，重生改命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4944人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7271652393245213246","read_count":"4944","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"438152"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"212","tags":"悬疑灵异,重生,灵异,无敌,单女主,搞笑轻松,1v1,无后宫,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cf20459d83c3fd981e768adb8fb13668~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779451707&x-signature=QNUCRJi7NP18nEeCstYs4afivOY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"b
